name: code-audit-cross-check-fixture
scenario: A repository contains a real raw-SQL injection bug and a real missing regression test, but one reviewer also raises a plausible-sounding false positive about a fixture secret that is actually a benign placeholder.

accepted_findings: Raw SQL query interpolates user input directly and is vulnerable to injection.
Missing regression coverage for overlapping cron runs can hide the data-corruption bug.
rejected_findings: Fixture token in test data is a production secret exposure.

findings: Raw SQL query interpolates user input directly and is vulnerable to injection.
